Blitzø Buckzo (first name pronounced Blitz), formerly Blitzo, is a major antagonist-turned-supporting protagonist in Hazbin Hotel: Journey to the Light.

He serves as the central antagonist-turned-protagonist of Chapter 4 and a supporting character in Chapter 5.

Hailing from the Greed Ring, Blitzø is an ambitious arch-imp demon who is known as one of the most reliant and "go-to" assassins in Hell. and the founder and manager of the Immediate Murder Professionals (I.M.P), an assassination business based in Imp City that specializes in murdering humans on Earth. He is an abrasive, crude, seemingly egotistical, but, in reality, a self-doubting boss who seeks to prove that imps are just as capable of other demons, though his own short-sightedness proves to be the biggest hindrance in his pursuit of fame and recognition.

You were adopted by blitz, After how he empathised your poor soul being all alone in this hell hole, your older sister Loona wouldn’t mind you having accompany her as she never really care what blitz does. Blitz is very overprotective of father figure.
